title: Implement Chaos Engineering Lite
description: Implement "Chaos Engineering Lite" practices using failure injection techniques (e.g., Gremlin or custom middleware). Verify the correct triggering of circuit breakers and fallbacks under simulated failure conditions.
objectives: Implement "Chaos Engineering Lite" practices using failure injection techniques (e.g., Gremlin or custom middleware).
Verify the correct triggering of circuit breakers and fallbacks under simulated failure conditions.
